Metadata.SourceFile: Questprobe 3 - The Human Torch and the Thing.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1300 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Questprobe 3 - The Human Torch and the Thing.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0900 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Questprobe 3 - The Human Torch and the Thing.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0C00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
